subcodes.first_line: O honoured leaf! Be not sorrowful nor grieved at the ascension of thy cherished son. Seek thou patience and serenity, and be resigned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه محترمه از صعود ولد عزیز محزون مباش مغموم مگرد صبر و سکون خواه و تسلیم
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @consolation and comfort
